name: three_agents_contention
description: Three concurrent resident agents with different lease priorities: Agent A (weather dashboard, tiles at 1Hz), Agent B (notifications, Stack contention), Agent C (subtitles, LatestWins contention). Verifies namespace isolation, zone contention resolution, lease priority shedding, and no cross-agent content leakage.

invariants.namespace_isolation: Each agent can only read/write tiles in its own namespace
invariants.zone_notification_policy: notification-area uses Stack; both publishes must be present
invariants.zone_subtitle_policy: subtitle uses LatestWins; only latest publish must be active
invariants.lease_priority_order: priority 1 (high) > priority 2 (normal) > priority 3 (low); shedding removes priority-3 tiles first
